examples: This process is referred to as metastasis.
The research could lead to new therapies for preventing cancer metastasis.
The metastatic part: Metastasis means the tumor spread outside its original site.
Soon-Shiong offers up a list of scientists who he says are excited by his theory of metastasis.
In May 2004, just a week before her wedding, she had developed a melanoma metastasis in her left lung.
